# Highcharts Ternary Plot

> Ternary / triangular plot plugin for Highcharts. Visualize three-component composition data with barycentric diagrams. TypeScript support included.

Official [Black Label](https://blacklabel.net/highcharts/) plugin for [Highcharts](https://www.highcharts.com/) that adds support for ternary (triangular / barycentric) charts — used to visualize data where three components sum to a constant (typically 100%).

- Version: 2.0.0
- Requires: Highcharts 12.0.0+
- License: MIT
- TypeScript: bundled type definitions included
- Author: Black Label (blacklabel.net)

## Use cases

Ternary charts are used in geology (soil composition), chemistry (phase diagrams), materials science, nutrition (macronutrient ratios), and market research (share of three competing options).

## Installation

```bash
npm install highcharts-ternary-plot
```

## Minimal usage

```js
import Highcharts from 'highcharts';
import 'highcharts-ternary-plot';

Highcharts.chart('container', {
    chart: { type: 'ternaryscatter' },
    ternaryAxis: {
        a: { title: { text: 'A' } },
        b: { title: { text: 'B' } },
        c: { title: { text: 'C' } }
    },
    series: [{
        data: [
            { a: 50, b: 30, c: 20 },
            { a: 10, b: 60, c: 30 }
        ]
    }]
});
```

- Live demo: https://blacklabel.github.io/highcharts-ternary-plot/
